login.heroTitle: Take control of your finances with a clear and actionable view.
login.heroDescription: Check your balance, review your transactions, and manage your income and expenses from a single interface.
login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Log in to view your dashboard and transactions.

register.heroTitle: Start organizing your finances from day one.
register.heroDescription: Create your account to track transactions, understand your habits, and make better decisions with your money.
register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Fill in your details to access your personal space.

dashboard.title: A clear view of your financial activity
dashboard.subtitle: Review your overall balance, inspect recent movements, and quickly understand how your money is behaving.
dashboard.netPositive: Your income is staying ahead of your spending.
dashboard.netNegative: Your spending is currently above your income.
dashboard.balanceHint: Net result for the selected period.
dashboard.savingsHint: Share of income that remains after spending.

transactions.title: Recent transactions
transactions.emptyDescription: Once you start registering movements, they will appear here with date, status, and amount.

stats.title: Monthly pulse
stats.chartAria: Monthly comparison chart for income and expenses
stats.emptyDescription: When the backend returns data for this endpoint, it will appear here.

createTransaction.title: Create transaction
createTransaction.subtitle: Register income or expenses and update your dashboard instantly.
createTransaction.typeIncomeHint: Perfect for salary, sales, or any incoming money.
createTransaction.typeExpenseHint: Use it for purchases, bills, or recurring payments.
createTransaction.name: Name

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.transactionNameMin: Name must be at least 3 characters

errors.refreshTokenFailed: Session expired. Please log in again.
